programme.title: Munsters 204
programme.desc: Munsters 204

programme.title: Addams Family 133
programme.desc: Addams Family 133

programme.title: Love Boat 116
programme.desc: Love Boat 116

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: A pregnant black leopard raised in a circus is brought to Wameru even though she has attacked her last trainer and killed her previous litters of cubs Tracy hopes to change her behavior in the new environment

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: An Egyptologist is killed just before the opening of a stagey exhibit featuring the mummy of an ancient Egyptian prince who legend says is waiting for his princess to join him in death -- and she looks just like Jennifer

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: A teenager is raped when hes accidentally sent to a violent prison over a petty crime resulting in both a lawsuit from his parents and a case for Cagney and Lacey to solve

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Captain Dobeys determination to heat up a cold case puts him and his family in the crosshairs of a grudge-nursing ex-cop sprung from prison by a corrupt corporate CEO who wants both Dobey and the case put on ice

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: When the families of all his Vietnam flight crew are kidnapped including Dom and Cait; Hawke must follow the clues and a mysterious friend to save them

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A commercial psychic uses a mystic hearing aid to read the thoughts of his audience

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S04E17
programme.desc: After he agrees to go to the turnabout dance where the girls ask the boys with Bobbie Jo Tommy Johnson has to back out since he ends up having another commitment Bobbie Jo who told all her friends about the date with the most sought after boy in her class feels that she cant ask anyone else in that social circle to the dance since he would know that he was second choice But as Billie Jo and Steve recently had a fight where Billie Jo isnt speaking to him anymore Bobbie Jo feels that Steve is fair game as a potential date to the dance Bobbie Jo even asks Billie Jo if its all right and Billie Jo gives her consent

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Jeremiah Priddy a temperance lecturer is coming to the valley Such a lecturer hasnt been seen in the valley for some time since no one in the valley really drinks Meanwhile Betty Jo has a new somewhat unwanted friend A quiet little boy who she doesnt know but played catch with is following her around even back to the hotel Everyone at the hotel doesnt know what to do with Clint - which they eventually learn is his name - except to make sure hes OK until they find out to who he belongs They finally learn that his father is Jeremiah Priddy and that Clint ran away as Mr Priddy is less than a friendly or hospitable man Mr Priddy deals with his son much as he deals with anyone who drinks unyielding Kate has a change of heart about Mr Priddy when she learns a little more about him She uses this information to try and bring him and Clint closer together

programme.title: TBH 218
programme.desc: TBH 218

programme.title: TBH 215
programme.desc: TBH 215

programme.desc: Munsters 103

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: When Wilbur balks at buying a new car for Carol she hitches up a buggy to Mister Ed Ed then reports her to the SPCA

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Bank robber Tom Birch and his outlaw gang arrive in North Fork where Birch has some unfinished business--he wants to visit his old friend Lucas McCain

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury a criminal arrested by Micah Torrance returns from five years in prison determined to avenge himself upon the town marshal

programme.title: Gunsmoke S08E13 Us Haggens
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S08E13 Us Haggens

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: The spirit of a dead voodoo priestess strikes out at three voodoo Legbas to get their power and resurrect herself and take revenge on the fourth Legba who killed her

programme.title: Fright Night 2
programme.desc: Fright Night Part 2 is a sequel to link=tt0089175] Charley Brewster and the horror host Peter Vincent must face more vampires out for revenge

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A groom to be gets a lesson in monogamy from the stripper from hell at his bachelor party and then his bride is overwhelmed with suspicion and mistrust and busts married men who cheat due to having caught her father step-out on mom when she was a child

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A bum displays his ability to resurrect himself

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hooker learns that beauty is only skin deep

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: An emotionally unstable woman becomes obsessed with the idea that her husband is having an affair

programme.title: Hitchhiker 511
programme.desc: Young man on the brink of success is about to marry the woman of his dreams However his past comes calling

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick chases a psychopath who is burning people alive and tries to protect the targets of the killers rage -- a band of homeless living under the citys streets

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Klink helps an old friend by assisting Hogan in the theft of the plans for an assassination on the Fuehrer

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Three American women show up at Stalag 13 and Hogan wants to know why

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Binghamton refuses permission for McHale and The Crew to put on a big show to raise funds for the local Orphanage Parker uses his newly-acquired skill as a Hypnotist to make The Captain more agreeable But the scheme is complicated by the visit of a Senator from the Armed Services Committee

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Parker - A dead-ringer for an important British General - Agrees to put his life on the line by posing as The General to divert the attention of spies in New Caledonia while the real General carries out a crucial invasion of a Japanese-held island

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer is a look-out for burglars robbing the base

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers favorite actress visits the base

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan discovers an underground source of hot water on the island but The Professor soon learns that the source of the hot water is an active volcano on the other side of the island

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An impostor posing as Mr Howell claims to having been rescued and begins selling off Mr Howells stocks The real Mr Howell offers his fellow castaways a hefty reward to get him off the island and save his fortune

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Feeling that hes been forgotten on his birthday Grampa runs away from home

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa has a cold but he doesnt trust the new doctor - or any doctor for that matter

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: What happens when BJ and the Bear transport a circus veteran his granddaughter and their trained elephant through the turf of Wiley and the Fox

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol decides to give her current beau the boot Ed defends a woman whose employer is suing her and Mike is humiliated when Dr Jerome second guesses him

programme.title: Love Boat 120
programme.desc: Love Boat 120

programme.title: WKRP 102
programme.desc: WKRP 102

programme.title: WKRP 106
programme.desc: WKRP 106

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Herman doesnt want his old mentor to know he know works at a supermarket; Wood helps out in son Wills class

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood hopes Florida State coach Bobby Bowden will offer Taylor a football scholarship

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: When a friend of Dans whos also a PI is killed his girlfriend asks him to look into it At the same time theres a PI convention going on at the hotel and some other PIs are getting killed A female PI knows something but shes not willing to share it When an attempt is made on her she reveals that she and other PIs were hired to solve a case thats been unsolved for years

programme.title: Hart 220
programme.desc: Hart 220

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Stephanie collects several parking tickets driving Dicks car but Dick ends up having to pay them

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael hires Stephanie to be the television stations new receptionist but her terrible performance forces him to fire her

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan believes he has become an old man after his hair turns completely white overnight but The Professors solution only makes things worse when his hair completely falls out

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch is alarmed when a child that he saved from drowning six years ago is now a part of a Haitian voodoo cult When Mitch and Ryan investigate they turn to a voodoo priestess Madam Trudor to help them

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alpha Moonbase needs a rare ore known as Milgonite which is detected on an extremely dry planet Koenig leads a small landing force and discovers a glowing rock formation which comes alive and cuts off the partys links with the base It is a trap - the planet needs water to survive and has lured the travellers there for the water in their bodies

programme.title: Gamera War of the Monsters
programme.desc: Prehistoric monster Gamera returns to wreak havoc on Japan American version of the classic kaiju film Gamera vs Barugon

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke are arrested when they mistakenly pick up a crate containing a marijuana shipment Private detective Mason Dixon and his two beautiful female associates are convinced the Duke boys are innocent and they work together to bring down a drug-smuggling operation

programme.title: Hercules 217
programme.desc: Hercules 217

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A new inter-dimensional portal system for human travel turns out to be something more when the resistance discover a CVI in a boy who got lost in the system

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: War of the Worlds

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim encounters Humphrey a dwarf who has escaped from the evil Dr Arcane

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane makes a woman look like Hollands wife He makes sure Holland aka Swamp Thing sees her He approaches her and she runs away He later tests her She then asks him for his notes hoping it could help him But Arcane is after one of his formulas At the same time Holland recalls his last moments with his wife and moment when he became Swamp Thing because of Arcane

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble wants to expose a defect in the bloodline of a kennel owners dog but the son and daughter-in-law threaten to stop him

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: The ArgonautsCheyenne meets two prospectors whose partner was killed by Indians The partner is the only one who knows where they found gold Given a description Cheyenne is able to lead them to the gold but one of the mens greed overtakes him

programme.desc: Stone pursues a killer who shot an officer about to retire in three days; guests Tim OConnor Eileen Heckart

programme.desc: An elderly cardinal has been taken prisoner in a fictional Eastern European country because the clergyman is the leader of the political opposition The IMF force is tasked with freeing him from the inescapable prison

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of a fight sport athlete, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Ali Toly.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Talon poses as a DJ to infiltrate HQs annual Missionball Ball and trap all the guests with his hypnotic speakers

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Penny and Talon compete to solve the mystery of the Sphinx while Gadget is stuck with a riddle of his own

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Last Engineer decides to return to human society and leads an expedition of colonists to establish a New Earth on the far side of the galaxy

programme.title: Challenge of the Gobots
programme.desc: In an attempt to take over the Earth by travelling into the past the Renegades accidentally go back to ancient Rome and are mistaken for gods

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and Flora sense Vantus presence again and Gillian also senses a great deal of power Vantu has captured the magic of the world and put it in a pyramid When he delivers Jayce to Saw Boss the power will be his to use without interference
